name: Cherry Waldorf Gelatin
recipeIngredient: Garnishes include apple slices and/or celery leaves.
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the gelatin according to package instructions using 2 cups boiling water.
2. Mix in 1/4 cup lemon juice, 1 cup chopped apples, 1 cup chopped walnuts or pecans, and 1 cup chopped celery.
3. Place lettuce leaf on serving dish.
4. Pour prepared mixture into serving dish.
5. Refrigerate until set.
6. Garnish with apple slices and/or celery leaves before serving.
